translation: The genealogy of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.

alternate_translations.translation: The book of the generations of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
alternate_translations.notes: “Βίβλος γενέσεως” can be rendered more formally as “book of the generations,” echoing the Hebrew-style phrasing behind “genealogy/generations.” Both “genealogy” and “generations” are valid depending on how closely one follows the source wording.

notes: This is the opening title line of the Gospel of Matthew (Matthew 1:1). Greek “γενέσεως” here conveys “genealogy/lineage,” not just “birth.” The repeated “son of” emphasizes descent in a patriarchal lineage from Abraham through David to Jesus.
